name: Tuna & Macaroni Casserole Sicilian
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces tuna in water, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat oil over medium flame.
2. Add onions, bell peppers, and garlic. Cook until all is tender.
3. Stir in crushed tomatoes, tomato sauce, parsley, salt, sugar, basil, oregano, and lemon juice. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Stir in tuna and cooked elbow macaroni. Heat over low flame for 5 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese and serve.
